K-matrix.name: 技能矩阵式

L-compare.name: 对比双栏式

O-dashboard.name: 数据看板式

U-bold.name: 杂志封面式
U-bold.css: *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{background:__BG_EXT__;display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:40px 0;font-family:-apple-system,'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}.page{width:210mm;min-height:297mm;background:__BG__;box-shadow:0 0 0 0.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);position:relative;overflow:hidden}@media print{body{background:#fff;padding:0}.page{box-shadow:none;margin:0;width:210mm;min-height:297mm}}.bold-hero{background:linear-gradient(160deg,__HERO_BG1__,__HERO_BG2__);padding:50px 20mm 40px;text-align:center;color:__HERO_TEXT__}.bold-hero h1{font-size:42pt;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:0.08em;line-height:1;margin-bottom:8px}.bold-hero .tagline{font-size:11pt;color:__HERO_MUTED__;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:18px}.bold-hero .metrics-row{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:40px}.bold-hero .met{text-align:center}.bold-hero .met .num{font-family:'SF Mono','Consolas',monospace;font-size:24pt;font-weight:800;color:__ACCENT__}.bold-hero .met .lbl{font-size:7pt;color:__HERO_DIM__;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px}.bold-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0;padding:0}.bold-col{padding:20px 18mm}.bold-col h2{font-size:9pt;color:__ACCENT__;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;border-bottom:2px solid __ACCENT__;padding-bottom:4px;display:inline-block}.bold-card{background:__CARD__;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:10px;border-radius:4px;box-shadow:0 0 0 0.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);border:0.5px solid __BORDER__;border-left:3px solid __ACCENT__}.bold-card .hd{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:4px}.bold-card .hd b{font-size:10.5pt;color:__TEXT_DARK__}.bold-card .hd span{font-size:7pt;color:__ACCENT__;font-weight:600}.bold-card .role{font-size:8.5pt;color:__MUTED1__;margin-bottom:6px}.bold-card p{font-size:8pt;color:__TEXT__;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:2px;padding-left:10px;position:relative}.bold-card p::before{content:'—';position:absolute;left:0;color:__ACCENT__}.bold-footer{background:__TAG__;padding:12px 18mm;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;justify-content:center;border-top:1px solid __BORDER__}.bold-footer .chip{font-size:7pt;background:__CARD__;color:__ACCENT__;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:3px;border:0.5px solid __ACCENT__30}

Y-table.name: 表格式
Y-table.css: *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{background:__BG_EXT__;display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:40px 0;font-family:-apple-system,'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}.page{width:210mm;min-height:297mm;background:__BG__;box-shadow:0 0 0 0.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);position:relative;overflow:hidden}@media print{body{background:#fff;padding:0}.page{box-shadow:none;margin:0;width:210mm;min-height:297mm}}.tbl-header{background:__HERO_BG1__;color:__HERO_TEXT__;padding:28px 20mm 22px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;border-bottom:4px solid __ACCENT__}.tbl-header h1{font-size:32pt;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.06em}.tbl-header .meta{text-align:right;font-size:8pt;color:__HERO_MUTED__}.tbl-section{padding:0 18mm;margin:16px 0}.tbl-section h2{font-size:10pt;color:__ACCENT__;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;padding-left:10px;border-left:3px solid __ACCENT__}.tbl-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}.tbl-table td,.tbl-table th{padding:8px 10px;font-size:8pt;text-align:left;border-bottom:0.5px solid __BORDER__;vertical-align:top}.tbl-table th{background:__TAG__;color:__ACCENT__;font-weight:700;font-size:7pt;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap}.tbl-table td{color:__TEXT__;line-height:1.6}.tbl-table .date{color:__ACCENT__;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;font-size:7pt}.tbl-table .company{font-weight:700;color:__TEXT_DARK__;font-size:9pt}.tbl-table .role{color:__MUTED1__;font-size:7.5pt}.tbl-table .summary{font-size:7.5pt;color:__MUTED1__;font-style:italic}.tbl-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px}.tbl-tag{font-size:6.5pt;background:__TAG__;color:__ACCENT__;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:3px}.tbl-footer{padding:12px 18mm;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid __BORDER__;font-size:7pt;color:__MUTED1__}

Z-bars.name: 技能进度条式
Z-bars.css: *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{background:__BG_EXT__;display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:40px 0;font-family:-apple-system,'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}.page{width:210mm;min-height:297mm;background:__BG__;box-shadow:0 0 0 0.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);position:relative;overflow:hidden}@media print{body{background:#fff;padding:0}.page{box-shadow:none;margin:0;width:210mm;min-height:297mm}}.bars-hero{background:linear-gradient(160deg,__HERO_BG1__,__HERO_BG2__);padding:36px 20mm 30px;color:__HERO_TEXT__;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end}.bars-hero .left h1{font-size:36pt;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.06em;line-height:1}.bars-hero .left .sub{font-size:9pt;color:__HERO_MUTED__;margin-top:6px}.bars-hero .right{text-align:right;font-size:7.5pt;color:__HERO_DIM__}.bars-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0;padding:0}.bars-col{padding:18px 18mm}.bars-col h2{font-size:10pt;color:__ACCENT__;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:14px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:2px solid __ACCENT__;display:inline-block}.bars-item{background:__CARD__;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;border-radius:4px;box-shadow:0 0 0 0.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);border:0.5px solid __BORDER__}.bars-item .hd{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:8px}.bars-item .hd b{font-size:10.5pt;color:__TEXT_DARK__}.bars-item .hd span{font-size:7pt;color:__ACCENT__;font-weight:600}.bars-item .role{font-size:8pt;color:__MUTED1__;margin-bottom:8px}.bars-item p{font-size:7.5pt;color:__TEXT__;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:3px}.bars-skill-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px}.bars-skill-row .label{font-size:7pt;color:__TEXT__;min-width:60px;text-align:right}.bars-skill-row .bar-track{flex:1;height:8px;background:__BORDER__;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden}.bars-skill-row .bar-fill{height:100%;background:__ACCENT__;border-radius:4px}.bars-sidebar{padding:18px 18mm;background:__TAG__;border-top:1px solid __BORDER__;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center}.bars-sidebar .chip{font-size:7pt;background:__CARD__;color:__ACCENT__;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:4px;border:0.5px solid __BORDER__}
